scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
